case_title: CENTRAL REFRIGERATED SERVICE, INC. VS. PARIS AHAKUELO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-21-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1033; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEE; CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTRAL REFRIGERATED SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTRAL REFRIGERATED SERVICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHAKUELO, PARIS $12,370.56 PRINCIPAL, $4,568.63 INTEREST, $429.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,368.19, SEE SCANNED DOC
